subcodes.first_line: O teacher in the school of the love of God! The heavenly teaching is, in this day, the sign of the Covenant and the meaning of the written Tablet [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای معلم دبستان محبت الله تعلیم سماوی الیوم ایت میثاقست و معانی لوح مسطور و رق
subcodes.subjects: @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
